name: Mexican Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Shredded Monterrey Jack Cheese, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onion, green pepper, water and butter in a 2-quart casserole or medium bowl. Microwave at High for 2 to 3 minutes, or until vegetables are rehydrated. Stir in green chilies. Set aside.
2. Mix together eggs, cottage cheese and seasonings. Sprinkle 1 1/2 cups chips over bottom of a 12 x 8 inch dish. Spoon half of cottage cheese mixture over chips.
3. Spread half of onion mixture over cottage cheese. Sprinkle with 1 1/2 cups Monterrey Jack and 1 cup Cheddar cheese. Repeat layers of chips, cheese and onion.
Microwave time: 19 - 27 minutes
Standing time: 3 minutes
